titleStmt.title: SII 29.74: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 74. (A.R. No. B. 783 of 1962-63.) GULBARGA, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the Municipal garden.

It belongs to the reign period of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Jayantīpura. It records that mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Hemmādi[yarasa] made a grant of 40 mattar land along with four others [named] of Kadagaṅchi to the god Mallikārjuna, installed by Govindajīya at Kadaganchi. The grant was made for the worship and offerings to the god. The record is incomplete since the bottom portion of the slab is broken and lost.
It is dated in the Chalukya Vikrama year 42, Hēmaḷambi, Pushya, śu. 8, Monday, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1117 A.D., December 3, Monday. There was no saṁkrānti on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarā
raṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya
śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
tribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁ saluta jayantīpurada nelevīḍi
noḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājya(ṁ)geyyuttamirdu tatpāda
padmōpajīvi samadhigata paṁca mahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara vīra
māhēśvaraṁ nijakīrtti mandākini pavitrīkṛtadi gaṁganāyakhaṁ catu
raṁgabaḷa samaraṣaṇmukhaṁ dīnanāthāśrita śiṣṭajanakanaka va
rṣa sujanajana cittāpahāra navadharimada nivāraṇa kana gandhavāraṇa
nija kuḷakamaḷa motta śvidalasiva maṇḍaḷikara gaṇḍa śrīmattibhu
vanamalladēva pādārādhaka parabaḷasādhakaṁ samādhi samasta pra
sasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara hemmāḍiyarasa
ḻkeya kaḍagaṁciya gōvindajīyara śrīmallikārjunadēvara
nivēdyakkavenu śrī macāḷukya vikrama varṣada 42 neya hēmaḷaṁbi sa
vatsarada puśya suddha 8 sōmavāradandu Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti vya
tīpāta nimittaṁ kaḍagaṁciya kāḷimarasanuṁ mallarasanuṁ
padmarasanuṁ sāvaṇadeyana magaṁ biṁbarasanuṁ minti nālvaruṁ (bi)ṭṭa
kadagaṁciya mūḍaṇa Asaganūra baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka
kālaḍiya mattarāṟu Aṁkada 40 mattaṟu
kariṁ Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷi
puṇya sva The slab is broken and lost.
Digital edition of SII 29.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
